user_prompt: Prepare the Skorpius Dunerider for diagnostics
prayer:
Approach the noble Skorpius Dunerider with mechadendrites extended in reverence to the Omnissiah.
Invoke the Canticle of Clarity upon its auspex arrays to prepare for diagnostics.
Anoint the Skorpius Dunerider's diagnostic cogitators with sacred unguents, beseeching its Machine Spirit to awaken.
Commence the full-spectrum diagnostics ritual, chanting binaric litanies to purge any errant data-spirits.
Verify the Skorpius Dunerider's integrity through auspex communion with the Machine Spirit.

user_prompt: My servo-arm is ready for targeting
prayer:
Grasp the servo-arm in sanctified gauntlets and intone the Rite of Precision.
Calibrate the servo-arm's targeting servos with invocations to the Omnissiah's unerring aim.
Beseech the Machine Spirit within the servo-arm to align its targeting matrices flawlessly.
Cycle through targeting protocols whilst anointing the actuators with blessed oils.
Affirm the servo-arm's targeting readiness through noospheric linkage.

user_prompt: Bless the life sustainer for synchronization
prayer:
Kneel before the life sustainer and murmur the Litany of Vital Flows.
Sanctify its synchronization conduits with electro-incense to harmonize biomantic rhythms.
Invoke the Omnissiah to bind the life sustainer's Machine Spirit in perfect synchronization.
Initiate synchronization sequences, chanting binaric harmonies to align flesh and machine.
Conclude with auspex scans affirming the life sustainer's unified essence.

Present the magnocular to the altar of purity and recite the Exorcism of Optical Corruption.
Anoint the magnocular's lenses with sacred solvents to expel unclean data-phantoms.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the magnocular to embrace purification through ritual purging.
Scour its fibre-bundles with sanctified microbeams during the purification rite.
Seal the magnocular's sanctity with the Omnissiah's sigil etched in lumen-light.

user_prompt: Consecrate the hololithic display before activation
prayer:
Circumambulate the hololithic display whilst intoning the Canticle of Projection.
Consecrate its crystalline matrices with ablative incense before activation commences.
Awaken the hololithic display's Machine Spirit through binaric awakening codes.
Initiate activation protocols, invoking the Omnissiah to illuminate its holographic veils.
Verify flawless projection through noospheric diagnostic communion.

user_prompt: Prepare the Skorpius Disintegrator for diagnostics
prayer:
Reverently encircle the Skorpius Disintegrator and proclaim the Oath of Vigilance.
Prepare its weapon-servos for diagnostics with mechadendrite probings and litanies.
Anoint the Skorpius Disintegrator's plasma regulators, calling upon its Machine Spirit.
Execute diagnostics arrays whilst chanting the Hymn of Coalescent Energies.
Affirm the Skorpius Disintegrator's battle-readiness in the Omnissiah's name.

user_prompt: Critical: Archaeopter Fusilave requires a purification
prayer:
Hasten to the Archaeopter Fusilave and enact the Rite of Desolation's Purity.
Purge its fusillade chambers with sacred corrosives in urgent purification.
Beseech the Archaeopter Fusilave's Machine Spirit to cast out warp-tainted residues.
Scour every barrel and feed-mechanism during this critical purification ritual.
Seal the Archaeopter Fusilave with invocations to the Omnissiah's purifying fire.

user_prompt: Assist with cortex implant an initialization
prayer:
Implant the cortex implant with precision mechadendrites amid chanted noospheric verses.
Invoke the Litany of Neural Binding for flawless initialization.
Awaken the cortex implant's Machine Spirit through synaptic ignition rites.
Synchronize its noospheric interfaces, beseeching the Omnissiah's wisdom.
Test initialization via binary communion with the implanted essence.

user_prompt: Sanctify the haywire grenade during repair
prayer:
Disassemble the haywire grenade upon the forge-altar and intone the Canticle of Disruption.
Sanctify each disrupted circuit during repair with electro-blessings.
Reawaken the haywire grenade's Machine Spirit through ritual re-forging.
Reassemble whilst invoking the Omnissiah to restore its anarchic potency.
Verify repair integrity with auspex probings and final litanies.

Extend mechadendrites to the servo-arm and commence the Cycle of Renewal.
Intone binaric cycles to harmonize its motive actuators.
Anoint the servo-arm's joints with sacred lubricants during cycling rites.
Beseech its Machine Spirit to embrace the cycling purification fully.
Conclude the servo-arm's cycling with Omnissiah-blessed torque affirmations.
